subject: Fix policy/api charts
commit_message:
Fix policy/api charts

Add "policyadmin" db into policy-api config.json

Issue-ID: POLICY-1640
Change-Id: I9c091b35eaae0a734d4371bcf619ebdfa9dac9d3
Signed-off-by: Chenfei Gao <cgao@research.att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

The same comments I made at Ram's review applies to yours Chenfei : https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/85231/

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/1963/ : SUCCESS

already in.

Patch Set 2:

Is it possible we combine all 3 OOM reviews into one?? And somebody add in the changes needed for Xacml PDP?
